name: deepseek-workbench
description: Local-first, DeepSeek-native desktop agent workbench skeleton.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @deepseek-workbench/runtime build && pnpm --filter @deepseek-workbench/runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @deepseek-workbench/conformance typecheck && pnpm --filter @deepseek-workbench/browser-extension typecheck
scripts.test:conformance:live: pnpm --filter @deepseek-workbench/runtime build && pnpm --filter @deepseek-workbench/conformance build && node conformance/dist/live-runner.js
scripts.verify:v0.1-slice: vitest run runtime/test/web-table-to-csv-flow.test.ts runtime/test/web-table-extractor.test.ts runtime/test/tool-broker.test.ts && pnpm test:conformance:dry && pnpm eval:web-table-to-csv && pnpm run web-table-to-csv -- --help
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:conformance:dry && pnpm test:conformance:live && pnpm verify:v0.1-slice && pnpm check:boundaries && pnpm check:secrets
